title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Toppr Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Toppr Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Toppr Capital India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Toppr Capital India:
Toppr Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr Capital India!
